policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-aps-16 - Audit for enabling of remote debugging'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+App+Service#IncidentremediationAppService#drcp-aps-16 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP App Service Site Slot remote debugging
policyDefinition.description: This policy denies Remote debugging for App Service apps since it requires inbound ports to be opened on the app.

drcp.name: AppServiceSiteSlotRemoteDebuggingEnabled
drcp.controlDesc: Audit for enabling of remote debugging

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
